title: PlayerEx
description: Adds attributes, levels and skill points - RPG themed.
body: [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=5da545&label=Available%20for&prefix=%20&query=0.game_versions&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/o5GUN4b1/version&style=flat-square)](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerex) [![](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=5da545&label=Latest&prefix=%20&query=0.version_number&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/o5GUN4b1/version&style=flat-square)](https://modrinth.com/mod/playerex/versions) [![](https://img.shields.io/github/license/CleverNucleus/PlayerEx?style=flat-square&color=0078CE)](https://github.com/PlayerEx/blob/main/LICENSE) PlayerEx registers fully functional RPG themed attributes to the game, and adds them to the player by default (they can be added to other living entities). Also added are levels, skill points and configurable levelling. The mod is powered by [Data Attributes]( https://modrinth.com/mod/data-attributes), which provides the bulk of the configurability – please familiarise yourself with it before attempting to customise PlayerEx. For more detailed documentation, please read the [wiki]( https://github.com/CleverNucleus/PlayerEx/wiki). ### Notes and Guidance - Please try to always use the latest release, as it is the version I will provide support for. - Also check out AsianHalfSquat’s [video](https://youtu.be/WvI7EgZv-7U?t=52) featuring PlayerEx.
